description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a white picket fence and featuring a spacious backyard with mature trees and a manicured lawn. The house has large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. A swimming pool with a deck area is situated at one end of the property, adjacent to a patio with outdoor seating. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a two-car garage, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and landscaped planters. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms and utility spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a white fence. Features include a garage, open living spaces, and a spacious backyard with mature trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the front, highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a large tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, revealing the open backyard, patio area, and the pool at the far end, with the house's open-plan layout visible.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear of the house, showcasing the pool, deck, and extensive glass doors opening to the outdoor living area.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, emphasizing the backyard, mature trees, and the seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small porch, steps, and landscaped planters, framed by clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
